channel.title: R-Ladies Baltimore on R-Ladies Baltimore
channel.description: Recent content in R-Ladies Baltimore on R-Ladies Baltimore

item.title: R packages for scraping data from the web
item.description:
Come out to our January 2019 event to hear talks from XX great R Ladies!

Describe event briefly

Visit our Meetup page for more details and to RSVP.

Date: Wednesday, January 16, 2019

Time: 5:30pm

Speakers: XX and ZZ.

Host: WW

item.title: Using R in Industry
item.description:
Come out to our November event to hear talks from three great R Ladies!

This meeting will highlight local Baltimore R-Ladies analyzing data in industry. It will include presentations from three speakers to discuss how they use R in their jobs and examples of projects they work on!

Visit our Meetup page for more details and to RSVP.

Date: Wednesday, November 14, 2018

Time: 12:00pm

Speakers: Coming soon!

Host: Coming soon!
